item.title: clawhq blueprint list + preview commands
item.intent: clawhq blueprint list and preview must let users evaluate every available blueprint before committing to init. Users must never choose a blueprint blind.
item.description: HIGH VALUE: Gate for informed blueprint selection. Without clawhq blueprint list/preview, users run init blind — they can't evaluate options before committing. Pairs tightly with CQ-009 (loader already does the heavy lifting). Build immediately after CQ-009. Acceptance: 'clawhq blueprint list' shows all available blueprints with one-line descriptions; 'clawhq blueprint preview email-manager' renders full design (identity, tools, skills, cron, integrations, security posture, egress domains). No net-new logic — thin CLI surface over CQ-009.
steps: Implement 'clawhq blueprint list' showing available blueprints with one-line descriptions
Implement 'clawhq blueprint preview <name>' showing full blueprint design
Display: identity, tools, skills, cron, integrations, security posture, egress domains in preview
acceptanceCriteria: 'clawhq blueprint list' shows all available blueprints with one-line descriptions
'clawhq blueprint preview email-manager' renders full design
Preview shows identity, tools, skills, cron, integrations, security posture, egress domains
